# EmpathAI

> EmpathAI is a private, browser-first AI emotional companion for teens and young adults (ages 13–22). It offers warm, non-clinical conversational support, a webcam-based Mood Mirror (on-device, no uploads), a healing toolkit (breathing, grounding, affirmations, task breakdown), and a crisis-support resource locator. EmpathAI is not a substitute for professional mental health care.

## What EmpathAI is
- **Private by design.** Conversations and mood data are stored locally in the user's browser by default.
- **Teen-safe.** Server-side safety rules cannot be overridden by user input; the assistant always points to 988 (US) or local emergency services on crisis disclosures.
- **Multiple support styles.** Listener, Coach, CBT Guide, Friend, Therapist-style, Reflective.
- **Neurodiverse-friendly.** Neuro Mode and Simple Language Mode adapt response style.
- **Not a clinician.** EmpathAI does not diagnose and is not a replacement for therapy.

## Key pages
- [/](https://friendlypal.lovable.app/) — Landing page and product overview
- [/sanctuary/chat](https://friendlypal.lovable.app/sanctuary/chat) — AI chat companion with mode selection
- [/sanctuary/mirror](https://friendlypal.lovable.app/sanctuary/mirror) — On-device Mood Mirror (webcam emotion sensing)
- [/sanctuary/toolkit](https://friendlypal.lovable.app/sanctuary/toolkit) — Breathing, grounding, affirmations, task breakdown
- [/sanctuary/insights](https://friendlypal.lovable.app/sanctuary/insights) — Personal mood trends from local history
- [/sanctuary/crisis](https://friendlypal.lovable.app/sanctuary/crisis) — Crisis hotlines and local support locator

## Safety and limitations
- EmpathAI is not a licensed clinician and does not provide diagnoses.
- If you or someone you know is in crisis, call or text 988 (US) or your local emergency line.
- AI-generated resource suggestions on the crisis page should always be verified before contacting.
